mapper.select: select id, ticket_main_text_id, quote, status, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time from ticket_main_text_quote where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0

select id, ticket_main_text_id, quote,status,quote_order_id,create_time from ticket_main_text_quote where is_deleted = 0 and ticket_main_text_id in
#{i}
select id, ticket_main_text_id, quote,status,quote_order_id,create_time from ticket_main_text_quote where is_deleted = 0 and quote_order_id = {orderId}
mapper.insert: insert into ticket_main_text_quote(id, ticket_main_text_id, quote, status, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) values (#{id}, #{ticketMainTextId}, #{quote}, #{status}, #{isDeleted}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})

insert into ticket_main_text_quote(id,ticket_main_text_id, quote, status, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) values
(#{entity.id},#{entity.ticketMainTextId}, #{entity.quote}, #{entity.status}, #{entity.isDeleted}, #{entity.createUser}, #{entity.updateUser}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime})

insert into ticket_main_text_quote(id,ticket_main_text_id, quote, status, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) values
(#{entity.id},#{entity.ticketMainTextId}, #{entity.quote}, #{entity.status}, #{entity.isDeleted}, #{entity.createUser}, #{entity.updateUser}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime})
on duplicate key update ticket_main_text_id = values(ticket_main_text_id), quote = values(quote), status = values(status), is_deleted = values(is_deleted), create_user = values(create_user), update_user = values(update_user), create_time = values(create_time), update_time = values(update_time)
